text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship goes head-to-head with Nakayama
Festa to get one step closer to her dreams' true
meaning and to the ultimate goal of Eden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First off is a spicy showdown, to fuel those bile
tanks! Next is an abdominal affray that'd make
anyone hurl—one hundred sit-ups in a minute!
Somehow, both contestants pull through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look on as the competition ends in a literal
stand-off to see who can be the best mall
mannequin. Being scrutinized by the public
proves too much for Nakayama Festa, and Gold
Ship claims victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back, Gold Ship tells me about the
voice in her dreams telling her to go to Eden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Could her dreams really be connected to Eden?
Gold Ship takes off in an all-out sprint, leaving
me lost in thought.
